description: Composition Cream polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has red and brown stripes, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, white fabric collar, short chest placket, embroidered detailing on the upper left chest and on the base of the placket, brand name tab appliqued on the left hemline, and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold separately using a mild detergent Turn inside out before washing and drying Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishement/embroidery Get ready for a clean sophisticated look in this striped cream polo neck t-shirt from lee. The embroidered branding on the left chest and long sleeves add an element of interest, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.3&rdquo , Shoulders-19"
